member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Alephable
member.summary: Gets the active bom group.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Alephable.ShareStorageContext
member.summary: The SharedStorage's key to save the comma-separated list of configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Alephable.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration
member.summary: Passes information from PacketConfiguration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfigurations
member.summary: Gets or sets PacketConfigurations.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.Schema
member.summary: Gets or sets schema.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration
member.summary: Passes information from PacketConfiguration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name for this configuration. Used to retrieve this instance's settings during runtime.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.DataPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the pins to be used as data pins for packet generation.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.IdPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of the pins to be used as id pins for packet generation.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.ValidPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the names of pins used for packet validation.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.ValidValues
member.summary: Gets or sets a list of allowed binary values when concatenating the values of all ValidPins for a given cycle.
member.remarks: Must be populated if contains any pins. The length must be the same as the length of the valid pins.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.PacketSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected size of each packet generated by the PacketDecoders.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.ErrorWhenPacketSizeMismatch
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to raise an error if the packet size is not the same as the one defined by .

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.TryGetAlephedConfig(System.String,Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a configuration from SharedStorage that was created by ALEPH.
member.param: Name of the configuration used for lookup.
The configuration retrieved from shared storage (if return value is true, null otherwise).
SessionContext.
member.returns: A value indicating whether the configuration existed in SharedStorage, and if the config is populated.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration.GetPinsForCapture
member.summary: Gets a list of all pins needed for data capture for a functional test.
member.returns: The list of pins to capture.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.DecoderBuilder
member.summary: Static class that contains logic needed to instantiate objects that implement .

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.DecoderBuilder.BuildLinearDecoder(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new that automates the process of packet parsing. This constructor will retrieve a configuration generated through SharedStorage.
member.param: Name of the configuration file used to configure this instance of .
Context of the test method calling this API.
member.exception: If the configuration is not found in SharedStorage, this is thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.DecoderBuilder.BuildLinearDecoder(Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new that automates the process of packet parsing. This constructor will retrieve a configuration generated through SharedStorage.
member.param: Name of the configuration file used to configure this instance of .
Context of the test method calling this API.
member.exception: If the configuration is not found in SharedStorage, this is thrown.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.ILinearDecoder
member.summary: A decoder that assembles packets in linear fashion by concatenating incoming CTVs that belong to the same id. The order of the CTVs are are concatenated in the order of their cycle. Once enough CTVs that belong to a Id are concatenated to meet the user's desired length for a packet, a new string is created to form the next packet belonging to the given Id.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.ILinearDecoder.GetPacketsForId(System.String)
member.summary: Get all valid packets whose CTVs match to the given id value. Returns an empty list if no packets were found.
member.param: The binary value that matches to the id pins of each CTV.
member.returns: All packets assembled using CTVs that matched to the id value given to this function.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.ILinearDecoder.GetAllPackets
member.summary: Returns all valid packets mapped to their id values.
member.returns: Return a dictionary with all valid packets mapped to their id.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.ILinearDecoder.GetAllPacketsWithOrder
member.summary: Returns all valid packets along with the the order each packet came in. This order is defined by the order of the first CTV used to construct each packet.
member.returns: A mapping of Id value to received order + packet data.
member.remarks: Dictionary layout returned as => { PacketKey: { ReceivedOrder: PacketValue } }.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.ILinearDecoder.GetLayeredPacketsForIds(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Given a list of id values, return a list of concatenated strings that are assembled by: iterating through user provided list of id values, then concatenating the nth packet that belongs to a the id value to the nth string in the returning list.
member.param: A list of id values used to query packets.
member.returns: A list concatenated packets that are layered using the algorithm described above.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder
member.summary: Interface that defines base packet decoder functionality.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder.Config
member.summary: Gets the configuration used for this decoder.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder.ProcessCtvData(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Using ctv data, begin the processing of CTVs into packets.
member.param: CtvData gathered by functional test execution.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder.ProcessFailureData(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Using a list of , create CTV data, then process the CTVs into packets.
member.param: Fail data gathered by functional test execution.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder.GetInvalidPackets
member.summary: Returns a concatenation of invalid CTVs to form packets.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.IPacketDecoder.GetUnexpectedPinFailures
member.summary: Return all pin names who failed which were not defined by the user configuration.
member.remarks: Use this API after processing fail data.
member.returns: Return a list with all non-configured pin failures.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder
member.summary: Class that processes or ctvData into packets. The behavior of this depends on the user's config.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.DefaultIdValue
member.summary: Default Id value in case of no id pins specified.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.resultPatternGroups
member.summary: Gets or sets the results of the packet processing after executing or .

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.invalidResult
member.summary: Gets or sets invalid packets after executing or .

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.config
member.summary: Contains the configuration that defines this instance of behavior.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.unexpectedFailingPins
member.summary: Gets or sets list of unexpected pin failures.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.pinDataVectors
member.summary: Gets or sets the pins whose values will be processed.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.idPinVectors
member.summary: Gets or sets ID Pins values. The values from these pins are used to differentiate packets from one another.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.validPinVectors
member.summary: Gets or sets the pins that are checked to see if a given packet is valid.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.Configuration.PacketConfiguration,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Object containing configuration for this LinearDecoder.
The context of the test method that created the .

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.GetInvalidPackets
member.remarks: Invalid packets are created from the concatenation of invalid CTVs.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.CreatePackets
member.summary: Create packets based on processed failing data. Also filters packets based on the values from the ValidPins.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.CheckPacketsSize
member.summary: Checks if all packets have the waited size via a modulus eval against setting's PacketSize.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.LinearDecoder.InsertPacketValue(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.UInt32,System.String}},System.String,System.Int32,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Inserts a packet value for one cycle.
member.param: Dictionary to store the packets.
The value from the id pins that signifies unique packets.
The fail data cycle to add to a packet that matches to the given id value.
Value which records the order that packets are received.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities
member.summary: Helper functions that contain common logic that classes need.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities.GetMappingOfTosPinNameToUserPinName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Given a list of pins defined by the user, get the full name defined by TOS for these pins. Required for when a unit is executing in intradut flows.
member.param: The user's name for the pins available on the tester.
Session context.
member.returns: A mapping of user's name for a pin to the name used by TOS for the pin.
member.exception: If any pins defined by the user are reported as non-existent by TOS, this is thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities.CreateCtvDataFromCycleFails(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}@)
member.summary: Takes a list and turns into a mapping of pin -> ctvData.
member.param: Failure data to convert into vector data.
A mapping of TOS pin names to user defined pin names that are expected to have fails.
A list containing all pins that failed that were not part of the tosPinNameToUserPinMapping param.
member.returns: A mapping of pin to vector data.

member.summary: Given vector data and an instance of , split the vector data into three different lists. One for data pins, one for id pins, and another for valid pins.
member.param: Dictionary containing vectors for all pins.
Configuration containing info to set up the passed in ref params.
List of data pins -> vector data that is set up.
List of id pins -> vector data that is set up.
List of validation pins -> vector data that is set up.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities.GetSubsetOfPinData(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Given a dictionary of Pin name -> data for pin, return ordered key-value pairs of the dictionary.
member.param: Superset of pin data requested.
The pins that will contained within the subset.
member.returns: A ordered subset of the pinDataSuperset. Ordered by the order of desiredSubset values.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities.GetCycleDataForPins(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the cycle data for a given cycle given a mapping of Pin -> vector data.
member.param: Information about pins.
The cycle to return the data for.
member.returns: Data for a given cycle. Returns the state for each pin at the given cycle.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.PacketDecoder.PacketUtilities.IsCycleValid(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: For a given cycle, check if the valid pins match against the valid values.
member.param: The cycle to check.
A list of binary values that represent the allowed values for the designated cycle.
The mapping of pin name to it's data vector. This data is used to determine if the cycle is valid.
member.returns: True if the cycle is valid, false otherwise.
